sidebar.deleteConfirmBody: This action cannot be undone. The chat and all its messages will be permanently deleted.

chat.dropFilesSub: Images, PDFs, and text files supported

mediaModal.previewNotAvailable: Preview not available for this file type

landing.title: Agentic AI for the rest of us
landing.subtitle: An AI assistant that plans, takes actions, and gets real work done
landing.description: I'm building this as a solo developer. Usage credits cost real money — so I can't sustainably give them away. Please sign in to continue and keep things fair.
landing.privateBody: Your chats are stored per-account and won’t mix across devices.
landing.profileBody: Change your name, avatar, and sign out any time from Settings.
landing.whySignInBody: It lets the app keep a stable client id for your account, store your chat history, and enforce fair usage.
landing.feature1Body: Spark searches, analyzes sources, and takes actions — not just generates text.
landing.feature2Body: For complex tasks, Spark builds a step-by-step plan and follows it to completion.
landing.feature3Body: Spark delivers more thoughtful and detailed answers, especially for complex tasks.
landing.feature4Body: Spark selects the optimal model for each step — fast, efficient, and cost-aware.

auth.signInSub: Sign in to continue to your chats and AI tools.
auth.signUpSub: Next step after signup: subscription selection (coming soon).
auth.stableIdBody: Your client id is your account id — consistent across devices.
auth.chatHistoryBody: Chats are stored per account, not per session.

paymentRequired.title: Time to renew subscription
paymentRequired.body: Your payment period has ended. To continue using Telos Spark, please select a plan and confirm payment.

topUp.title: Top Up
topUp.subtitle: Add credits
topUp.description: Specify the amount in rubles — we will add it to your current period balance.

subscription.mainTitle: Choose a plan — or build your own.
subscription.mainSubtitle: You can choose one of the ready-made plans, or specify your own price and period — the system will automatically calculate spending limits for each day until the next payment.
subscription.customSub: You set the price and period
subscription.redirectNote: After payment you will be automatically redirected to the result page. If you closed the tab — just open the payment again.

payment.noTokenError: Token for payment initialization not found. Go back to subscription page and try again.
payment.widgetError: Yookassa widget failed to load. Try refreshing the page.
payment.description: The payment form will open on the right. After completion, you will be redirected to the result page.
payment.feeValue: Final amount includes YooKassa commission of 3.5% of the base price

paymentResult.noPaymentId: paymentId not found. Go back and try again.
paymentResult.checkingBody: Usually this takes a few seconds.
paymentResult.successBody: Access updated. You can return to the app.
paymentResult.errorBody: Try refreshing the page or try again later.
paymentResult.cancelledBody: Payment was cancelled. You can go back and try again.
paymentResult.waitingBody: If you just paid, wait a few seconds.

limit.title: Daily limit reached
limit.body: You have reached your daily spending limit. You can top up your balance or continue spending more today — then the daily limit for the following days will become smaller.

agentSelector.title: Telos Spark
agentSelector.subtitle: Select an agent to begin your session

tooltips.plan: Enables step-by-step planning for complex tasks and can be turned off for quick, simple questions.
tooltips.proMode: Activates Pro mode: access to the most powerful models and advanced capabilities for solving the most complex tasks.
tooltips.sendDisabledStreaming: Wait for AI to finish generating the response
